plugin_desc: Adtran AOS 路由器专用 SNMP 采集模板（ADTRAN-AOS MIB，企业号 664）。除标准 IF-MIB 接口指标外，额外采集 Adtran 私有 OID 的设备健康指标：CPU 使用率（adGenAOSCurrentCpuUtil，直接以百分比上报）与内存（adGenAOSMemPool 总量 + adGenAOSHeapFree 空闲，字节，用量按 （总量-空闲）/总量 推导）。未暴露温度/风扇/电源专用 OID，故为 N/A。适用品牌型号——Adtran AOS 路由器/网关（NetVanta 系列及其他 adtran-aos 平台，企业号 664）。
name: Router

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: CPU utilisation of the Adtran router (ADTRAN-AOSCPU adGenAOSCurrentCpuUtil).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_total
metrics.description: Total memory of the Adtran router in bytes (adGenAOSMemPool).

metrics.name: device_memory_free
metrics.description: Free memory of the Adtran router in bytes (adGenAOSHeapFree).

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the Adtran router, derived as (total-free)/total.
